title: Stuck On Starting 'node'
excerpt: I followed all of the Quick Start App Integration steps but my terminal keeps getting stuck on [nodemon] starting node ./src/app.js. I saw other people were having issues with this and were told to edit a line in the pac…

posts.author: rmolin (Rene)
posts.cookedHtml:
I followed all of the Quick Start App Integration steps but my terminal keeps getting stuck on [nodemon] starting node ./src/app.js. I saw other people were having issues with this and were told to edit a line in the package.json file to this “expose”: “ngrok http 8301”. I looked into the package.json file but dont see anywhere where the “expose” line is. Below is a screen shot of the Package.json file that was created in the quicktart-integrations folder.

image795×632 19.2 KB

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @rmolin and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

Can you please send us an email to appsupport@monday.com with this information so we can take a look from there?

Looking forward to hearing from you via email!

Cheers,
Matias
